text:
おねえさんに誘われたからには
断るわけにいかないって？

あはは！
別に断っちゃダメってことはないけど
きっと有意義な実戦訓練になるよ！

清く正しいブレイバーのため
もうひとがんばり、ってヤツだ！

そういえば、わたし
森林エリアって久しぶりだなあ。
しっかり先導、よろし
Can't turn down an request from me, huh?

I hope you don't actually feel that obligated.
You can say no, you know! But this is gonna
be some great practical training, I promise!

We keep at this, and we're sure to become
pure and righteous Bravers!

You know what, though? I haven't been out to
the forest in a good long while. I hope you
don't mind taking the lead for me.
